calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Dana Elkalas, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Phillis C. Trammell and Louis Williams Jr.
EXH.1 - Three-day Notice to quit dtd. 9-8-06--------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 516 O'Farrell St., #419, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $1,446.66
Costs $500.00, for a total of $1,946.66
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PHYLLIS C. TRAMMELL a.k.a. PHYLLIS TRAMMELL AND LOUIS WILLIAMS a.k.a. LOUISE WILLIAMS, JR.'S DEMURRER TO UNLAWFUL DETAINER COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED OCTOBER 16, 2006. (301/PJB/) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
